subject: [PATCH bpf-next v4 3/3] selftests/bpf: Check bpf_mem_cgroup_page_state return value

reviews.author: JP Kobryn (Meta)
reviews.summary: Suggested dropping the patch due to unnecessary checks and the use of bpf co-re enum helpers making stat indexes not an issue in cross-kernel scenarios.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: Reviewer suggests dropping the patch due to unnecessary checks.
